pre:Tỉnh Bà Rịa - Vũng Tàu.reason: Avoid maritime polygon label placement in the pre-2025 coastal boundary.

pre:Tỉnh Bình Thuận.reason: Avoid maritime polygon label placement in the pre-2025 coastal boundary.

pre:Thành phố Cần Thơ.reason: Pre-2025 Can Tho's OSM label node sits close to the eastern urban core; place the label nearer the visual centre of the city footprint.

post:Tỉnh An Giang.reason: Post-2025 An Giang merges An Giang and Kien Giang; place the label farther west inside the merged province body instead of near the Long Xuyen/Cao Lanh edge.

post:Thành phố Cần Thơ.reason: Post-2025 Can Tho merges Can Tho, Hau Giang, and Soc Trang; place the label closer to the merged city/province body instead of old Can Tho city centre.

post:Thành phố Đà Nẵng.reason: Post-2025 Da Nang merges Da Nang and Quang Nam; place the label between the old city and province label nodes instead of near the old Da Nang urban core.

post:Tỉnh Quảng Trị.reason: Post-2025 Quang Tri merges Quang Binh and Quang Tri; place the label between the old province label nodes instead of near Dong Ha on the southern edge.

post:Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh.reason: Post-2025 merged geometry includes offshore extent; keep label near the city centre.

post:Tỉnh Lâm Đồng.reason: Post-2025 merged geometry includes coastal/maritime extent; keep label on the inland province body.
